summary: Tested customer auth feature + checkout_status bug fix. 37 pytest tests, all PASS. Frontend verified: navbar (logged out shows Login/Register only, no Admin), /register flow creates account and redirects to /dashboard, /login page renders, ProductDetail Buy Now correctly redirects unauthenticated users to /login. Admin login at /admin/login still works. Bug fix for checkout_status verified - no longer returns 500.

minor.issue: Now returns 200 with payment_status='pending' when Stripe lookup fails - FIX VERIFIED. test_checkout_status_no_500_for_new_session passes.

action_items: (Optional) Visual smoke-check admin dashboard 'Customers' tab in browser - backend /api/admin/customers endpoint works correctly and is covered by pytest, but the playwright timeout did not let me click and verify the tab UI. data-testid='tab-customers' should be added if missing for easier automation.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py checkout_status now wraps Stripe call in try/except and returns cached DB status on failure - good fix.
verify_customer/verify_admin role separation is clean. optional_customer used for checkout/session to attach customer_id - good.
Customer password is hashed with bcrypt + uniqueness checks on email/phone are correct.

Phone normalizer (_normalize_phone) only keeps digits and '+' - the test agent's earlier UUID-hex-based phone test failed because hex chars were stripped (test bug, not backend bug; fixed by switching to numeric random).
CORS uses '*' from env - acceptable but consider tightening for production.
Minor: customer_login uses query_phone normalized from identifier even when user typed email - works because emails don't match the phone field pattern but is slightly wasteful.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@tripleside.studio / tripleside2025 (verified). Customers are created on-demand with TEST_ prefix.
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed customers created in DB via /api/customer/register. Persisted (no teardown) - safe because prefixed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py contains 37 tests covering admin auth/CRUD, customer register/login/profile/orders, role-based JWT enforcement, checkout (Stripe), and checkout_status bug-fix verification. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Frontend data-testids verified: navbar-login, navbar-register, account-menu-btn, account-menu-dashboard, account-menu-logout, register-name/email/phone/password/submit, customer-login-identifier/password/submit, customer-register-page, customer-login-page. Note: dashboard Logout & profile-edit specific data-testids weren't probed - rely on text selectors. AdminDashboard 'Customers' tab UI was not visually clicked due to timing but the backend endpoint passes.
rca of the issue: Previous iteration's bug (GET /api/checkout/status/{session_id} returning 500 when Stripe couldn't find a just-created session) is fixed: handler now wraps stripe.get_checkout_status in try/except and falls back to DB-cached payment_status with HTTP 200. Verified by test_checkout_status_no_500_for_new_session.
